case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. MARIA A. MORALES et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: 1) REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT [CCP 585] 2) COPOIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS [EVID 1550] 3) INTEREST WAIVED FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORALES, MARIA A. $6,823.77 PRINCIPAL, $280.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,103.77, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, MARIA A.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, MARIA A.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, MARIA A.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, MARIA A.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $280.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, MARIA A.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
